creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: I'm experiencing an issue as well but not sure if it's due to this or some other weirdness. But I've noticed that on my framework laptop on FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n255077-490a0f77de7, Chromium ignores my mute requests (either via Fn key or KDE Plasma UI), but respects volume increase / decrease requests. Firefox however respects all three and will (un)mute immediately.
